data.Name: Citrix - Possible machines in Maintenance Mode
data.Description:
This query will alert on machines that have remained on with no users logging into them with the last week.
Recommended actions:

Take the machine out of maintenance mode in Citrix Cloud.

context.description:
This query will alert on machines that have remained on with no users logging into them with the last week.
Recommended actions:

Take the machine out of maintenance mode in Citrix Cloud.

allOf.searchQuery:
let lookback = 2d;
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where DeviceName matches regex @"dtw10m-[0-9]{3}.int.dinhapnet.bcz.gov.au"
| extend LocalTime = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'Australia/Canberra')
| extend Day = dayofyear(LocalTime)
| extend Hour = hourofday(LocalTime)
| where Hour between (04 .. 18)
| distinct DeviceName, Day
| join kind=fullouter   (
    DeviceLogonEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where DeviceName matches regex @"dtw10m-[0-9]{3}.int.dinhapnet.bcz.gov.au"
    | extend LocalTime = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'Australia/Canberra')
    | extend Day = dayofyear(LocalTime)
    | extend Hour = hourofday(LocalTime)
    | where Hour between (04 .. 18)
    | where AccountName matches regex @"[a-z]{2}[0-9]{2}[a-z]{2}"
    | summarize by AccountName, DeviceName, Day
    | summarize count() by DeviceName, Day
    )
    on DeviceName, Day
| summarize make_set(count_), make_set(Day) by DeviceName
| extend array_sort_asc(set_Day)
| where array_length(set_Day_sorted) == 3
| where set_count_ == '[]'
| extend todatetime(now())
| extend Description = iff(array_length(set_Day_sorted) == 3, strcat(DeviceName, ' was powered on everyday and did not have logged in users within the last 3 days. This could mean the machine is in "Maintenance Mode" in Citrix Cloud. Please check this to save costs.'), "")
| project-away set_count_, set_Day, set_Day_sorted

data.Description:
This query will alert on machines that have remained on with no users logging into them with the last week.
Recommended actions:

context.description:
This query will alert on machines that have remained on with no users logging into them with the last week.
Recommended actions:

Take the machine out of maintenance mode in Citrix Cloud.

allOf.searchQuery:
let lookback = 2d;
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where DeviceName matches regex @"dtw10m-[0-9]{3}.int.dinhapnet.bcz.gov.au"
| extend LocalTime = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'Australia/Canberra')
| extend Day = dayofyear(LocalTime)
| extend Hour = hourofday(LocalTime)
| where Hour between (04 .. 18)
| distinct DeviceName, Day
| join kind=fullouter   (
    DeviceLogonEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where DeviceName matches regex @"dtw10m-[0-9]{3}.int.dinhapnet.bcz.gov.au"
    | extend LocalTime = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'Australia/Canberra')
    | extend Day = dayofyear(LocalTime)
    | extend Hour = hourofday(LocalTime)
    | where Hour between (04 .. 18)
    | where AccountName matches regex @"[a-z]{2}[0-9]{2}[a-z]{2}"
    | summarize by AccountName, DeviceName, Day
    | summarize count() by DeviceName, Day
    )
    on DeviceName, Day
| summarize make_set(count_), make_set(Day) by DeviceName
| extend array_sort_asc(set_Day)
| where array_length(set_Day_sorted) == 3
| where set_count_ == '[]'
| extend todatetime(now())
| extend Description = iff(array_length(set_Day_sorted) == 3, strcat(DeviceName, ' was powered on everyday and did not have logged in users within the last 3 days. This could mean the machine is in "Maintenance Mode" in Citrix Cloud. Please check this to save costs.'), "")
| project-away set_count_, set_Day, set_Day_sorted

data.Description:

Recommended actions:

context.description:
This query will alert on machines that have remained on with no users logging into them with the last week.
Recommended actions:

Take the machine out of maintenance mode in Citrix Cloud.

allOf.searchQuery:
let lookback = 2d;
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where DeviceName matches regex @"dtw10m-[0-9]{3}.int.dinhapnet.bcz.gov.au"
| extend LocalTime = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'Australia/Canberra')
| extend Day = dayofyear(LocalTime)
| extend Hour = hourofday(LocalTime)
| where Hour between (04 .. 18)
| distinct DeviceName, Day
| join kind=fullouter   (
    DeviceLogonEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where DeviceName matches regex @"dtw10m-[0-9]{3}.int.dinhapnet.bcz.gov.au"
    | extend LocalTime = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'Australia/Canberra')
    | extend Day = dayofyear(LocalTime)
    | extend Hour = hourofday(LocalTime)
    | where Hour between (04 .. 18)
    | where AccountName matches regex @"[a-z]{2}[0-9]{2}[a-z]{2}"
    | summarize by AccountName, DeviceName, Day
    | summarize count() by DeviceName, Day
    )
    on DeviceName, Day
| summarize make_set(count_), make_set(Day) by DeviceName
| extend array_sort_asc(set_Day)
| where array_length(set_Day_sorted) == 3
| where set_count_ == '[]'
| extend todatetime(now())
| extend Description = iff(array_length(set_Day_sorted) == 3, strcat(DeviceName, ' was powered on everyday and did not have logged in users within the last 3 days. This could mean the machine is in "Maintenance Mode" in Citrix Cloud. Please check this to save costs.'), "")
| project-away set_count_, set_Day, set_Day_sorted

Take the machine out of maintenance mode in Citrix Cloud.

data.Description:

context.description:
This query will alert on machines that have remained on with no users logging into them with the last week.
Recommended actions:

Take the machine out of maintenance mode in Citrix Cloud.

allOf.searchQuery:
let lookback = 2d;
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where DeviceName matches regex @"dtw10m-[0-9]{3}.int.dinhapnet.bcz.gov.au"
| extend LocalTime = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'Australia/Canberra')
| extend Day = dayofyear(LocalTime)
| extend Hour = hourofday(LocalTime)
| where Hour between (04 .. 18)
| distinct DeviceName, Day
| join kind=fullouter   (
    DeviceLogonEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where DeviceName matches regex @"dtw10m-[0-9]{3}.int.dinhapnet.bcz.gov.au"
    | extend LocalTime = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'Australia/Canberra')
    | extend Day = dayofyear(LocalTime)
    | extend Hour = hourofday(LocalTime)
    | where Hour between (04 .. 18)
    | where AccountName matches regex @"[a-z]{2}[0-9]{2}[a-z]{2}"
    | summarize by AccountName, DeviceName, Day
    | summarize count() by DeviceName, Day
    )
    on DeviceName, Day
| summarize make_set(count_), make_set(Day) by DeviceName
| extend array_sort_asc(set_Day)
| where array_length(set_Day_sorted) == 3
| where set_count_ == '[]'
| extend todatetime(now())
| extend Description = iff(array_length(set_Day_sorted) == 3, strcat(DeviceName, ' was powered on everyday and did not have logged in users within the last 3 days. This could mean the machine is in "Maintenance Mode" in Citrix Cloud. Please check this to save costs.'), "")
| project-away set_count_, set_Day, set_Day_sorted

This query will alert on machines that have remained on with no users logging into them with the last week.
Recommended actions:

Take the machine out of maintenance mode in Citrix Cloud.

data.Name: Citrix - Possible machines in Maintenance Mode
data.Description:
This query will alert on machines that have remained on with no users logging into them with the last week.
Recommended actions:

Take the machine out of maintenance mode in Citrix Cloud.

context.description:
This query will alert on machines that have remained on with no users logging into them with the last week.
Recommended actions:

Take the machine out of maintenance mode in Citrix Cloud.

allOf.searchQuery:
let lookback = 2d;
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where DeviceName matches regex @"dtw10m-[0-9]{3}.int.dinhapnet.bcz.gov.au"
| extend LocalTime = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'Australia/Canberra')
| extend Day = dayofyear(LocalTime)
| extend Hour = hourofday(LocalTime)
| where Hour between (04 .. 18)
| distinct DeviceName, Day
| join kind=fullouter   (
    DeviceLogonEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where DeviceName matches regex @"dtw10m-[0-9]{3}.int.dinhapnet.bcz.gov.au"
    | extend LocalTime = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'Australia/Canberra')
    | extend Day = dayofyear(LocalTime)
    | extend Hour = hourofday(LocalTime)
    | where Hour between (04 .. 18)
    | where AccountName matches regex @"[a-z]{2}[0-9]{2}[a-z]{2}"
    | summarize by AccountName, DeviceName, Day
    | summarize count() by DeviceName, Day
    )
    on DeviceName, Day
| summarize make_set(count_), make_set(Day) by DeviceName
| extend array_sort_asc(set_Day)
| where array_length(set_Day_sorted) == 3
| where set_count_ == '[]'
| extend todatetime(now())
| extend Description = iff(array_length(set_Day_sorted) == 3, strcat(DeviceName, ' was powered on everyday and did not have logged in users within the last 3 days. This could mean the machine is in "Maintenance Mode" in Citrix Cloud. Please check this to save costs.'), "")
| project-away set_count_, set_Day, set_Day_sorted

essentials.description:
This query will alert on machines that have remained on with no users logging into them with the last week.
Recommended actions:

Take the machine out of maintenance mode in Citrix Cloud.

context.description:
This query will alert on machines that have remained on with no users logging into them with the last week.
Recommended actions:

Take the machine out of maintenance mode in Citrix Cloud.

allOf.searchQuery:
let lookback = 2d;
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where DeviceName matches regex @"dtw10m-[0-9]{3}.int.dinhapnet.bcz.gov.au"
| extend LocalTime = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'Australia/Canberra')
| extend Day = dayofyear(LocalTime)
| extend Hour = hourofday(LocalTime)
| where Hour between (04 .. 18)
| distinct DeviceName, Day
| join kind=fullouter   (
    DeviceLogonEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where DeviceName matches regex @"dtw10m-[0-9]{3}.int.dinhapnet.bcz.gov.au"
    | extend LocalTime = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'Australia/Canberra')
    | extend Day = dayofyear(LocalTime)
    | extend Hour = hourofday(LocalTime)
    | where Hour between (04 .. 18)
    | where AccountName matches regex @"[a-z]{2}[0-9]{2}[a-z]{2}"
    | summarize by AccountName, DeviceName, Day
    | summarize count() by DeviceName, Day
    )
    on DeviceName, Day
| summarize make_set(count_), make_set(Day) by DeviceName
| extend array_sort_asc(set_Day)
| where array_length(set_Day_sorted) == 3
| where set_count_ == '[]'
| extend todatetime(now())
| extend Description = iff(array_length(set_Day_sorted) == 3, strcat(DeviceName, ' was powered on everyday and did not have logged in users within the last 3 days. This could mean the machine is in "Maintenance Mode" in Citrix Cloud. Please check this to save costs.'), "")
| project-away set_count_, set_Day, set_Day_sorted

| summarize make_set(count_), make_set(Day) by DeviceName
| extend array_sort_asc(set_Day)

| summarize make_set(count_), make_set(Day) by DeviceName
| extend array_sort_asc(set_Day)

| summarize make_set(count_), make_set(Day) by DeviceName
| extend array_sort_asc(set_Day)

| summarize make_set(count_), make_set(Day) by DeviceName
| extend array_sort_asc(set_Day)

| summarize make_set(count_), make_set(Day) by DeviceName
| extend array_sort_asc(set_Day)
| where array_length(set_Day_sorted) == 3
| where set_count_ == '[]'
| extend todatetime(now())
| extend Description = iff(array_length(set_Day_sorted) == 3, strcat(DeviceName, ' was powered on everyday and did not have logged in users within the last 3 days. This could mean the machine is in "Maintenance Mode" in Citrix Cloud. Please check this to save costs.'), "")
| project-away set_count_, set_Day, set_Day_sorted

data.Name: Microsoft - AzureHealthAlert
data.Description:
New Service Health notification from Microsoft. To review, please visit:
portal.azure.com/#view/Microsoft_Azure_Health/AzureHealthBrowseBlade/~/healthAlerts

context.description:
New Service Health notification from Microsoft. To review, please visit:
portal.azure.com/#view/Microsoft_Azure_Health/AzureHealthBrowseBlade/~/healthAlerts

allOf.searchQuery:
let lookback = 30d; let querywindow = 10m; let BaseQuery = AzureActivity | where CategoryValue == "ServiceHealth" | where Level != 'Informational' | extend Title = tostring(Properties_d.["title"]) | where Title !startswith "Mitigated" and Title !startswith "Resolved" and Title !startswith "Post Incident Review" | extend IncidentType = tostring(Properties_d.incidentType), Service = tostring(Properties_d.service), Communication = tostring(Properties_d.communication), SumariseByTitle = tostring(array_slice(split(Title, ' '), -4, -1)) | summarize arg_min(TimeGenerated, *) by CorrelationId // Reduce by same alert per subscription | extend Communication = replace_string(Communication, '', ' ') | extend Communication = replace_string(Communication, '

', ' ') | extend Communication = replace_string(Communication, '', ' ') | extend Communication = replace_string(Communication, '
', ' ') | extend Communication = replace_string(Communication, '

', ' ') | extend Communication = replace_string(Communication, '', ' ') | extend Communication = replace_string(Communication, '', ' ') | extend Communication = replace_string(Communication, ' ', ' ') | extend Communication = replace_string(Communication, '', ' ') | project TimeGenerated, Title, IncidentType, Service, Level, Communication, ResourceId, CorrelationId, SumariseByTitle ; BaseQuery | where TimeGenerated > ago(querywindow) | join kind=leftanti ( BaseQuery | where TimeGenerated between (ago(lookback) .. ago(querywindow)) ) on SumariseByTitle // leftanti all the alerts that have already produced per title as this can be noisy and lots of benign degridation incident updates from Microsoft

context.name: Microsoft - AzureHealthAlert

portal.azure.com/#view/Microsoft_Azure_Health/AzureHealthBrowseBlade/~/healthAlerts

data.Name: Fortimail - License Issue
data.Description:
Recommended actions:
Restart server to trigger the fortimail licence renewal. This will reset the counter for another 30 days

context.description:
Recommended actions:
Restart server to trigger the fortimail licence renewal. This will reset the counter for another 30 days
context.name: Fortimail - License Issue

allOf.searchQuery:
Syslog
| where HostIP in ("172.25.238.196", "172.25.238.197")
| where SeverityLevel == "warning"
| where SyslogMessage contains "license could not be validated for over"
| parse SyslogMessage with "license could not be validated for over " Days " days" *
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by HostIP
| project TimeGenerated, HostIP, toint(Days)
| extend Description = strcat("License could not be validated for over ", Days, " Days! If this gets to 30 days, the Fortimail server will not process mail. Please raise a ticket and notify APC Support.")
| where Days between (26 .. 30)

data.Name: Fortimail - Critical events
data.Description:
A query on the syslogs of all Fortimail servers found critical Fortimail events.
Recommended actions:

Google what the log is about
Is there an outage to email?
Send a test email?

context.description:

Recommended actions:

Google what the log is about
Is there an outage to email?
Send a test email?

allOf.searchQuery:
Syslog
| where HostIP in ("172.25.206.196", "172.25.206.197", "172.25.238.196", "172.25.238.197")
| where SeverityLevel =~ "critical"
| where SyslogMessage !contains "license status changed to VALID"
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by HostIP
| project TimeGenerated, HostIP, HostName, SeverityLevel, SyslogMessage

data.Name: Backup Failure
data.Description: Restore Point creation failed as the VMSnapshot extension encountered a non-retryable access denied error.

extendedInfo.recommendedActions: Please retry the operation after providing appropriate access. More information on troubleshooting is available at: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/backup/backup-azure-troubleshoot-vm-backup-fails-snapshot-timeout
extendedInfo.possibleCauses: VMRestorePointClientError : Restore Point creation failed as the VMSnapshot extension encountered a non-retryable access denied error. Please ensure providing appropriate access before retrying. More information on troubleshooting guideline https://aka.ms/VMExtensionVMSnapshotLinuxTroubleshoot.
